name: Bannau Sir Gaer & Llyn y Fan Fach
terrain: Track to reservoir then steep grass ridge
highlights: Legend of the Lady of the Lake — climb to Picws Du (749m) from a jewel-like tarn.
points_of_interest: Lady of the Lake legend; old waterworks buildings
viewpoints: Ridge drops of Bannau Sir Gaer; view to Carmarthen Bay
parking_start: Llanddeusant car park (end of single-track road)
hazards_notes: Remote; sheep on road; misty often
